title: SubplotBoard
description: Subplot board truth file — tracks active and dormant subplots. Part of the 7 truth files per REQ-F-14.

version.description: Schema version for future migration support.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this file was last modified.

description.description: Summary of what this subplot is about.

involvedCharacters.description: List of character IDs involved in this subplot.

introducedInChapter.description: Chapter where this subplot was first introduced.

lastUpdatedChapter.description: Most recent chapter where this subplot was advanced.

expectedResolution.description: Planned resolution or payoff for this subplot (optional).

notes.description: Additional context or reminders about this subplot.
